votes.rationale: Motion-0039 successfully validated the Claude setup routine for dev-jai-nexus. The repo now has a governed first-project workflow, a clear upload/read order, a reusable handoff checklist, and a setup validation note that explains how the generated Claude bootstrap pack should be used in practice.

The motion stayed tightly scoped. It did not redesign the generator or expand into provider orchestration, and instead turned the existing Claude bootstrap layer into a clearer, repeatable operating routine for actual use.

The implementation is coherent and operationally useful. The new workflow artifacts distinguish canonical artifacts from generated handoff layers and make starting new Claude work in dev-jai-nexus more repeatable and lower-friction.
